A '''cheater''' or '''cheater chip''' was a small disc-shaped device that was used to cheat at the game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]. [[T. Lund Phuna]] used one while playing on [[Oseon 2795]], in order to let [[Osuno Whett/Legends|Osuno Whett]] purposefully lose to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Wiring one into a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] helmet's [[DH107/Legends|DH107]] headset and using file B893a from ''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide]]'' created an effective [[channel scanner]] to listen in to encrypted communications.

{{Tech-stub}}
